problem id: 7cc61ea9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  00000110 -> 01000000
  00000111 -> 00100000
  11001110 -> 01011001
  11001010 -> 11011001
  01110010 -> 11001110
  10011101 -> 11110011
  01000101 -> 11101000
  01010100 -> 10001010
  10001110 -> 01010001
  01111010 -> 11001111

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 10100101
